name: Chocolate-Almond Pie
recipeIngredient: Unbaked pie shell in glass-pie pan
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Sift together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
3. Combine butter, milk, and extract in a bowl.
4. Add dry ingredients to wet ingredients and beat until smooth.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Pour the batter into the unbaked pie shell.
7. Melt chocolate in boiling water. Stir until smooth.
8. Add sugar and bring mixture to a boil.
9. Remove from heat and stir in butter and almond extract.
10. Pour the sauce over the pie filling.
11. Sprinkle chopped almonds on top of the pie.
12. Bake for 55-60 minutes, or until set.
13. Garnish with whipped cream and chocolate shavings.
